seoTitle: Hampton City Schools Calendar 2025-2026: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Hampton City Schools 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 25 first day, Jun 10 last day, holidays, winter break, spring break, exams, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Hampton City Schools starts the 2025-2026 school year on August 25, 2025. Winter Break runs December 22-January 2, Spring Break runs April 6-10, and the last day of school is June 10, 2026. The calendar also lists teacher workdays, elementary planning days, progress reports, report cards, early release dates, high school exam schedules, and graduations.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Hampton City Schools start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: Hampton City Schools starts school on Monday, August 25, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Hampton City Schools Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, April 6 through Friday, April 10, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Hampton in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Wednesday, June 10, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When are Hampton high school graduations in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The official calendar lists high school graduations on June 11-13, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: The first day of school is August 25, 2025.

yearNumbers.label: Last Day
yearNumbers.detail: The last day of school is June 10, 2026.
